---
title: "AI for UVM Economics"
subtitle: "AI tools for teaching and research"
page-layout: full
body-classes: landing-page
title-block-style: none
toc: false
---

::: {.landing-hero}
# AI for UVM Economics

[AI tools for teaching and research]{.hero-subtitle}

[Two lunch sessions introducing AI tools for teaching and research. No prior experience required.]{.hero-intro}
:::

::: {.container .py-4 style="max-width: 700px;"}

[Schedule]{.landing-section-title}

<table class="landing-schedule">
<thead>
<tr><th>Session</th><th>Date & Location</th><th>Focus</th></tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td class="session-num">Session 1 <span class="badge-date">Apr 22</span></td>
<td class="session-date">Wed 11:00–12:30, Old Mill A500</td>
<td class="session-focus">Getting started: what AI tools exist, how they work, live demos</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td class="session-num">Session 2 <span class="badge-soon">Apr 27</span></td>
<td class="session-date">Mon 11:00–12:30, Old Mill A500</td>
<td class="session-focus">Research pipelines, web scraping, automated grading</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[Session 1 Materials]{.landing-section-title}

::: {.materials-row}
[Slides (PDF)](Session1_Slides/session_1_slides.pdf){.material-link}
[Session page](session1.qmd){.material-link}
:::

[Before You Arrive]{.landing-section-title}

::: {.prep-note}
No installation needed — both sessions are watch-along demos. See the [Getting Set Up](prep.qmd) guide if you want to try things on your own afterward. For broader reading, see [Outside Resources](resources.qmd).
:::

:::
